final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for a "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey) reimagined as a 1990s Hong Kong cinema release.

Style/medium: needs a "90年代港片" aesthetic with film grain — references in the spirit of Wong Kar-wai's Chungking Express, 1990s Hong Kong wuxia poster tradition, Leslie Cheung-era romantic drama key art; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must feature the central embrace on the city wall as the focal point, with secondary figures positioned in the distant background
Subject: must include 至尊宝 (Zhi Zunbao) and 紫霞 (Zixia) embracing on the city wall as the central subject, with 牛魔王 (Bull Demon King) and 唐僧 (Tang Seng) standing in the distance
Scene/backdrop: must include the ancient city wall setting with atmospheric depth for background figures
Lighting/mood: needs a nostalgic, romantic 1990s Hong Kong cinema atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 1990s Hong Kong film direction — exact color grading is yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture throughout
Text (verbatim): must include "大话西游"
Constraints: must preserve the iconic city wall scene composition, all four characters present
Avoid:
